top_signals.title: Australia Secures Jet Fuel From China as War Strains Supplies
top_signals.summary: Australia has secured additional commodity supplies — bringing in jet fuel from China and urea from Brunei — as the Iran war strains markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: After U.S. SEC, Treasury and Justice departments offer billionaire Gautam Adani legal relief
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury Department settled a case against Adani Enterprises, involving the purchase of sanctioned Iranian energy between November 2023 and June 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Takeda engaged in antitrust scheme to delay generic constipation drug: U.S. jury
top_signals.summary: The verdict is the ​first time ‌a jury has found a pharmaceutical company liable in class-action litigation over what is called a "pay-for-delay" agreement with generic rivals.
